case_title: CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO VS SIMPSON, CHERITY

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO OFFICE OF THE TREASURER & TAX COLLECTOR AS TO DEFENDANT SIMPSON, CHERITY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-28-2000 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
